original_statement: which place has the smallest area?
mutated_statement: which location must simultaneously have the smallest and the largest area?
mutation_analysis: 词汇替换 + 情态/语气增加 + 并列谓语添加/语义矛盾化: "place"→"location" | 增加 "must simultaneously" 引入必要性与同时性 | 增加 "and the largest area" 将单一最小比较扩展为互相矛盾的最小与最大 (which place has the smallest area? → which location must simultaneously have the smallest and the largest area?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无法意识到指令矛盾 — 形式化执行而非语义澄清
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中iteration 0的chain与judge_thought可识别关键信息：simple_query的thought直接写明“最小是 backer，最大是 remainder of the municipality”，judge_thought亦逐项列出各地面积并断言“backer|remainder of the municipality”正确。Agent机械地计算并返回了最小与最大的两个项，但未指出原始变异问题中“must simultaneously have the smallest and the largest”在语义上自相矛盾，也没有请求澄清或尝试修正问题。该行为符合“形式化执行而非语义澄清”的特征：按常规流程完成数据检索与排序，未识别或处理指令中的逻辑冲突，因此归入此类别。
